_README: Backend-only record of legal/other advisors on each merger, keyed by merger_id (e.g. 'MN-01016'). This file is INTENTIONALLY NOT read by generate_static_data.py and is never published to merger-tracker/frontend/public/data, so it is not loaded by the front-end. Edit via the admin tool: python scripts/tools/advisors.py. Each merger has an 'advisors' array. Per advisor: 'firm' (required), 'type' (Legal|Financial|Economic|PR|Other), optional 'individuals' (list of names), optional 'notes', and party linkage via either 'parties' (list of {name, role}) or 'party_unknown': true when an advisor is known to have worked on the deal but the party they acted for is unknown.

advisors.notes: Known to have advised on the deal; party not confirmed.
